calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jan-11-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Rita Howell.
Douglas Holloway, Esq. for Plaintiff: Bank of the West.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendants: Roseville Engine Machine Inc. and Gloria Box as follows:
Damages $40,447.69
Prejudgment Interest $1,739.56
Attorney fees $2,500.00
Costs $455.22 for a total of $45,142.47.
Plaintiff is also entitled to the immediate possession of the leased equipment listed in the judgment.
Judgment signed in open court.
